scripts.build: npm run build -w @trade-app/shared && npm run build -w @trade-app/api && npm run build -w @trade-app/bot && npm run build -w @trade-app/collector && npm run build -w @trade-app/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @trade-app/shared && npm run typecheck -w @trade-app/api && npm run typecheck -w @trade-app/bot && npm run typecheck -w @trade-app/collector && npm run typecheck -w @trade-app/web
scripts.stop:prod: pm2 delete prime-api prime-bot prime-web prime-collector || true
